---
title: "Tutorials"
---

**This section is a work in progress**

## Tutorial 1: Your first registration
Learning goal: Understand the core registration workflow — creating a project, designing a form, enrolling a beneficiary, and viewing the record.

## Tutorial 2: Setting up a field deployment
Learning goal: Understand how BRaVe works in a real field context.

## Tutorial 3: Biometric enrollment and verification
Learning goal: Understand the biometric pipeline — enrollment, template extraction, matching, and deduplication.

## Tutorial 4: Assistance and referral
Learning goal: Understand how BRaVe tracks what assistance a beneficiary has received and how referrals between agencies work.
